basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rajkot Professor cum Principal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rajkot (AIIMS Rajkot)
basic_details.short_information: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Rajkot Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years. Age relaxation is applicable to Government Servants, PwBD, Ex-Servicemen as per GoI guidelines.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s Degree in Nursing Or Must be registered Nurse and Midwife.
qualification.details: Master’s Degree in Nursing with advanced specialization in Nursing from a recognized Institution/University. Must be registered Nurse and Midwife. 10 years experience in Nursing field after registration as Nurse, out of which seven years must have been spent in nursing education or administration after obtaining the prescribed post-graduate qualification. Desirable: Ph.D. (Nursing)

selection_process: and/or higher benchmarks / screening test if large number of applications) Document verification (only shortlisted candidates) Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Rajkot Professor cum Principal Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://aiimsrajkot.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Rajkot Professor cum Principal, College of Nursing post?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the hardcopy of the application along with supporting documents is 20 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Professor cum Principal, College of Nursing post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Professor cum Principal, College of Nursing post at AIIMS Rajkot.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master’s Degree in Nursing with advanced specialization and have 10 years of experience in the nursing field, with seven years in nursing education or administration.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Professor cum Principal, College of Nursing position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 55 years, with age relaxation applicable as per Government of India guidelines.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Professor cum Principal, College of Nursing post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will be paid as per Level 13 of the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC).

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website and send the completed form with required documents via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 500/-.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes shortlisting of applications, document verification, and a personal interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of AIIMS Rajkot: https://aiimsrajkot.edu.in.
